name: Paloma Circle Pool Deck Plan - 10x12 Pool Deck for 15' Round Pools | DIY PDF Plans
open_features: Designed specifically for 15' diameter round above-ground pools
Efficient 10x12 deck footprint - perfect for tight spaces and compact yards
Optimized walking clearance for safe and comfortable pool entry
Built-in railing layout for enhanced safety and clean aesthetics
Simple, clean design - ideal for quick builds & lower material costs
Easy-to-follow DIY PDF plans with full material cut list & step-by-step building guide
Pool Fit: 15' diameter round above-ground pools (pool not included)
description_summary:
The Paloma Circle Pool Deck Plan transforms your 15-foot above-ground pool into a charming and space-efficient backyard retreat. Featuring a compact 10x12 platform layout, this design provides safe access, smooth movement, and cozy lounge space - making it ideal for small yards, minimalist designs, and budget-conscious DIY builds. Paloma delivers simplicity, safety, and modern outdoor style in one smart pool deck solution. Key Features
